name: raptor-skies
description: Raptor Skies — a browser-based aerial combat game built with TypeScript and Canvas

scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently --kill-others -n "webpack,electron" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev" "npx electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run electron:compile && webpack --mode production --config webpack.electron.config.js
scripts.electron:package: npm run icons:generate && npm run electron:build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.electron:package:win: npm run icons:generate && npm run electron:build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.electron:package:mac: npm run icons:generate && npm run electron:build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:package:linux: npm run icons:generate && npm run electron:build && electron-builder --linux --publish never
